data.title: 6 signs predicting $140K as Bitcoin's next price top
data.description:
Key takeaways:Bitcoin's price is retracing, but strong ETF inflows, high network activity, and whale accumulation suggest BTC is on track to $140,000. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $2. 9 billion in net inflows in two weeks, mirroring past rallies. Declining exchange balances and a rising transaction volume Z-Score suggest increasing overall demand
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/6-signs-suggesting-140k-next-bitcoin-price-top?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CoinMarketCap launches CMC Launch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinMarketCap launched a project launch platform called CMC Launch, which aims to provide exposure and user participation opportunities for high-quality crypto projects that have not yet issued tokens (Pre-TGE). It is reported that the first online project is the decentralized perpetual contract trading platform Aster ($AST). (Chainwire)

data.title: What’s Next for Pi Coin Price? PI Crashes Despite Long Awaited Crypto News
data.description:
The Pi Coin price has plunged by 28% in the past 24 hours, sinking to $0.8811 as the cryptocurrency market as a whole loses 4% today.This steep fall follows the announcement of Pi Network Ventures, a $100 million fund aimed at supporting the development of apps on Pi Network.Despite the positivity of this news, it’s arguable that the Pi Coin price had risen too high in recent days, with the token still up by 41% in a week and by 31% in the past month
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/whats-next-for-pi-coin-price-pi-crashes-despite-long-awaited-crypto-news/

data.title: Coinbase Turns Tables on Would-Be Extortionists, Offers $20M Bounty for Information
data.description:
The attackers sent a ransom note demanding $20 million in Bitcoin, threatening to publish stolen customer data if Coinbase didn’t pay.
source: https://decrypt.co/320200/coinbase-turns-tables-on-would-be-extortionists-offers-20m-bounty-for-information

data.title: Crypto market maker Wintermute to establish US headquarters in New York
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto market maker Wintermute announced that it will open its first US headquarters in Lower Manhattan, New York on June 1, and appointed policy veteran Ron Hammond as head of policy and advocacy. The move comes as the Trump administration has taken a supportive attitude toward the crypto industry, including appointing heads of crypto-friendly regulators. (TheBlock)

data.title: Plume and DigiFT Announce iSNR, a Tokenized Note Tracking Senior Loan Strategy Managed by Invesco, to be Available on Nest
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Plume and DigiFT announced that iSNR, a tokenized note tracking a senior loan strategy managed by Invesco, will be launched on Nest, Plume's flagship RWA pledge agreement. This cooperation will directly introduce Invesco, which has a global asset management scale of US$1.9 trillion, into Plume's RWAfi ecosystem.
Through this cooperation, Nest users can obtain institutional-level returns with lower thresholds and higher liquidity, making investment opportunities that were previously limited to a small number of investors open to a wider group of investors.
The tokenized strategy will provide Nest's pledgers with exposure to a diversified portfolio of senior secured loans. The strategy will also be fully integrated into Plume's ecosystem, allowing users to earn actual returns while staking and use their pledged positions for DeFi applications such as lending, borrowing, and creating structured products.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell to Deliver Opening Remarks at Research Conference
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is scheduled to deliver the opening remarks at the Thomas Laubach Research Conference shortly. The event is set to begin in five minutes, where Powell will address attendees and share insights on current economic conditions and policy considerations.

data.title: eToro CEO: The company once bought BTC at $5, with a cumulative profit of $50 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: eToro CEO Yoni Assia said that the company initially bought Bitcoin at $5 as a financial reserve, and has now accumulated a profit of $50 million. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims and PPI Show Decline in April
data.description: According to PANews, the number of initial unemployment claims in the United States for the week ending May 10 reached 229,000, matching expectations. The previous figure was revised from 228,000 to 229,000. Additionally, the Producer Price Index (PPI) for April recorded an annual rate of 2.4%, marking the third consecutive monthly decline and the lowest level since September of the previous year. The monthly PPI for April showed a decrease of 0.5%, the lowest since April 2020, significantly below the market expectation of a 0.2% increase.

data.title: U.S. Retail Sales Show Slight Increase in April
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States reported a 0.1% increase in retail sales for April, surpassing market expectations of 0%. This data reflects a modest improvement in consumer spending, indicating a potential stabilization in the economic landscape.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Align with Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 10 reached 229,000. This figure met expectations, which were also set at 229,000. The previous week's data was revised from 228,000 to 229,000.

data.title: Fed Chairman Powell: No comment on outlook or monetary policy; PCE in April may be around 2.2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed Chairman Powell said he would not comment on the outlook or monetary policy; PCE in April may be around 2.2%, and the Fed is considering revising its communications. Given the level of inflation, the idea of ​​a moderate overshoot in inflation after a weak economy has become irrelevant. (Jinshi)
